mapper.select: SELECT S.ID, S.SLIP_NO, S.SLIP_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS SLIP_TYP_NM, S.SRC_NO, S.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(S.POSTING_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS POSTING_YMD, S.DR_ACCT, S.CR_ACCT, S.AMT, S.SLIP_STS, ST.CD_NM_KO AS SLIP_STS_NM, S.REG_ID FROM AC_SLIP S LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='SLIP_TYP' AND T.CD=S.SLIP_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE ST ON ST.GRP_CD='SLIP_STS' AND ST.CD=S.SLIP_STS AND ST.DEL_YN='N' WHERE S.DEL_YN='N' AND (S.SLIP_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR S.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR S.SRC_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') AND S.SLIP_STS=#{slipSts} ORDER BY S.ID DESC

SELECT S.ID, S.COMP_CD, S.SLIP_NO, S.SLIP_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS SLIP_TYP_NM, S.SRC_TYP, S.SRC_ID, S.SRC_NO, S.VD_CD, S.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(S.POSTING_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS POSTING_YMD, S.DR_ACCT, S.CR_ACCT, S.AMT, S.SLIP_STS, ST.CD_NM_KO AS SLIP_STS_NM, S.FISCAL_YM, S.ERP_DOC_NO, S.REMARK, S.REG_ID FROM AC_SLIP S LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='SLIP_TYP' AND T.CD=S.SLIP_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE ST ON ST.GRP_CD='SLIP_STS' AND ST.CD=S.SLIP_STS AND ST.DEL_YN='N' WHERE S.ID=#{id} AND S.DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AC_SLIP (COMP_CD, SLIP_NO, SLIP_TYP, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, SRC_NO, VD_CD, VD_NM, POSTING_YMD, DR_ACCT, CR_ACCT, AMT, SLIP_STS, FISCAL_YM, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{slipNo}, NVL(#{slipTyp},'PURCHASE'), #{srcTyp}, #{srcId}, #{srcNo}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, TO_DATE(#{postingYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{drAcct}, #{crAcct}, NVL(#{amt},0), 'DRAFT', #{fiscalYm}, #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE AC_SLIP SET SLIP_STS=#{slipSts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE AC_SLIP SET SLIP_STS='SENT', ERP_DOC_NO=#{erpDocNo}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE AC_SLIP SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, SLIP_ID, LINE_NO, DR_CR, ACCT_CD, ACCT_NM, AMT, REMARK FROM AC_SLIP_LINE WHERE SLIP_ID=#{slipId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AC_SLIP_LINE (SLIP_ID, LINE_NO, DR_CR, ACCT_CD, ACCT_NM, AMT, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{slipId}, #{lineNo}, #{drCr}, #{acctCd}, #{acctNm}, NVL(#{amt},0), #{remark}, #{regId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AC_SLIP WHERE SRC_TYP=#{srcTyp} AND SRC_ID=#{srcId} AND DEL_YN='N' AND SLIP_STS<>'CANCEL'
